posts.content: Feeling FOMO that I can't be at #CHI2026 this year but please check out all the great work that our @socialfutureslab.bsky.social + friends are presenting (see below for paper links). And say hi to @kjfeng.me @aliciaguo.com, Katie Yurechko, and Tony Zhou who are at the conference!

interestSummary: Amy Zhang is currently focused on the work of her social computing lab and colleagues, particularly their research being presented at the CHI 2026 conference.
